nasb.text: This is the burnt offering of every sabbath in addition to the continual burnt offering and its drink offering.

esv.text: this is the burnt offering of every Sabbath, besides the regular burnt offering and its drink offering.

cnv.text: 這是安息日獻的燔祭；在那常獻的燔祭和同獻的奠祭以外。

ccb.text: 这是在日常燔祭和奠祭以外安息日所献的燔祭。
